flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Bunker Hill Community College rose 24% between 2017 and 2020 ($8.5k → $10.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Bunker Hill Community College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.3k → $6.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Bunker Hill Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Bunker Hill Community College rose 18% between 2006 and 2009 (48.0% → 56.5%).
